ValidationRule.description: When claiming a passive/pool customer, the sales rep must provide an Ownership Reason.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(OwnerId), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Customer_Status__c), 'Passive'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Customer_Status__c), 'Pool') ), ISBLANK(Ownership_Reason__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter an Ownership Reason when claiming a Passive or Pool customer.
